betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Hydraulic Fracking Tower§f

§aInfinite oil from bedrock — at the cost of your surrounding landscape!§f

The §bHydraulic Fracking Tower§f is a massive multiblock machine capable of extracting §binfinite§f crude oil and natural gas from bedrock oil deposits. It requires §bFracking Solution§f and power to operate, and progressively pollutes the surrounding area with dead and oily blocks.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Machine):
§b• §e24×§f Steel Shell
§b• §e12×§f Steel Pipe
§b• §e64×§f Concrete
§b• §e1×§f Titanium Drill
§b• §e2×§f Desh Motor
§b• §e24×§f Desh Compound Plate
§b• §e16×§f Capacitor

§6Fracking Solution§f (Chemical Plant / Industrial Mixer):
§b• §e100mB§f Petroleum Gas + §e1,000mB§f Water + §e1×§f Sulfur → §e1,000mB§f Fracking Solution.
§b• Alt: §e100mB§f Petroleum Gas + §e900mB§f Sulfuric Acid → §e1,000mB§f Fracking Solution.
§b• Consumption§f: §e10mB§f per second base (§e64,000mB§f per tank).

§6Production Rates§f:
§b• Base§f: §e100 mB/s§f crude oil at §e100 kHE/s§f (Speed 0).
§b• Maxed§f (Speed 3 + Overdrive 2): §e2,000 mB/s§f at §e525 kHE/s§f.
§b• Speed 3 + Overdrive 3§f: Same as Overdrive 2 — hard cap at §e1 tick per extraction§f.

§6Environmental Impact§f:
The fracking tower converts surface blocks (grass, stone, dirt) into dead or oily variants within a large radius (§eσ=75§f, effectively §e300§f block radius). This pollution can support §bMustard Willows§f but kills all other plants. Affected blocks are gravity-affected like sand!

§eTip§f: Before unlocking the §bHydrotreater§f, the fracking tower cannot be made self-sustaining. Once you have the hydrotreater, both the Natural Gas and Cracked Oil outputs can be processed to recycle Fracking Solution components. Build this well away from your base!
